Cal Raleigh.why: Cal Raleigh is crushing contact at an elite rate (64% hard-hit), packs elite raw power, a 100/100 grade, the bat's heating up, and the model bumps him to 107.

J.P. Crawford.why: J.P. Crawford has a swing built for the seats (18°), banks on a mistake pitch to clear it (24/100 power), and the model still lands him at 77.

Dominic Canzone.why: Dominic Canzone is lighting up the radar gun (56% hard-hit), has real over-the-fence pop (57/100), the bat speed looks back, and the model has him at 121 for the night.

Cole Young.why: Cole Young gets there more on timing than thump (39/100 power), the projection backs him at 86, a bounce-back feels close, and +905 carries value.

Josh Naylor.why: Josh Naylor is squaring up a good chunk (50% hard-hit), brings fringe-average pop (34/100), lands at 84 in our model, and due to run into one.

Mitch Garver.why: Mitch Garver swings with natural lift (22°), is squaring up its share (47% hard-hit), packs respectable power (61/100 grade), and our projection sits at 99.

Randy Arozarena.why: Randy Arozarena is connecting solidly (51% hard-hit), wins with bat-to-ball over raw pop (27/100), grades to 90 on our board, and ready to break a quiet stretch.

Buddy Kennedy.why: Buddy Kennedy puts air under the ball (21°), is more table-setter than slugger (17/100), the model has him at 97 for the night, and no real cold streak to speak of.

Julio Rodr\u00edguez.why: Julio Rodríguez is striking it clean and hard (54% hard-hit), needs to square one up to leave (32/100 power), and our projection sits at 112.

Weston Wilson.why: Weston Wilson is putting the bat on it well (50% hard-hit), wins with bat-to-ball over raw pop (13/100), and he's squaring more up lately.

Luke Raley.why: Luke Raley is launching rockets (54% hard-hit), gets under it just right (17°), swings with usable power (64/100), and the momentum's with him.

Colt Emerson.why: Colt Emerson stays in the sweet-spot angle (22°), packs respectable power (55/100 grade), the momentum's with him, and our number on him is 79 tonight.

Victor Robles.why: Victor Robles is a contact-first bat hunting one good swing (8/100 power), recent form points up, our projection sits at 80, and up against Dylan Cease.
